goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'curry king'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '1 people' at '20:00' on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:30' and should go to 'birmingham new street'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called curry king
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 20:00 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 11:30 and should go to birmingham new street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
